completed = subprocess.run(
    command,
    shell=True,
    capture_output=True,
    text=True,
)
fixes.replacement:

    [program, str(target)],
    capture_output=True,

fixes.origin:
statement = (
    "SELECT id, reporter, title, status, attachment_name "
    "FROM incidents "
    "WHERE reporter = '" + reporter + "' "
    "AND status = '" + status + "' "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC "
    f"LIMIT {limit}"
)

cursor.execute(statement)
fixes.replacement:
statement = (
    "SELECT id, reporter, title, status, attachment_name "
    "FROM incidents "
    "WHERE reporter = ? "
    "AND status = ? "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC "
    "LIMIT ?"
)

cursor.execute(statement, (reporter, status, limit))
